description: PAGE 4 M C CARRAN ACT Its Effect On Immigration Policies Mewed and Reviewed in the AsiaPacific triangle shall be the same number heretofore deter mined under the provisions of sec tion II of the Immigration Act of 1924 attributable by national ori gin to such quota area provided that the quota existing for Chinese pentons prior to the date of enact ment of this act shall be continued and except as otherwise provided in section 202 e the minimum quota for any quota area shall be 100 Vba Immigrant visas allotted with PREFERENCE in four groups in each fiscal years the first 50 per centum the second 30 per cen tum the third 20 per centum the fourth rest In 1952 when the new McCarran Act was adopted by the Congress several publishers attacked this law The left wingers and the Com munists in the country were not sat isfied with the very sharp restric tions imposed A few magazines and publishers were in favor of this Act Now I shall write the opinion and criticism of other people regarding the McCarran Immigration Law The Nations scientists and teach ers are not going to like this Christmas present either
